POS OF OF NTC TO DMV FILED BY PETITIONER WONG, FRANK

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER FRANK WONG'S ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NONE OF THE PARTIES HAS PROVIDED COURTESY COPIES OF ITS FILING PER SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. IN ADDITION, RESPONDENT'S ANSWER INDICATES THAT THE REQUEST FOR A WRIT OF MANDATE IS PREMATURE BECAUSE PETITIONER HAS YET TO SERVE A COPY OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD ON RESPONDENT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.

calendar.matters:
Alternative Writ Of Mandate Order And Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER FRANK WONG'S Alternative Writ Of Mandate Order And Order To Show Cause is off calendar. None of the parties has provided courtesy copies of its filing per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. In addition, respondent's answer indicates that the request for a writ of mandate is premature because petitioner has yet to serve a copy of the administrative record on respondent. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

Alternative Writ Of Mandate Order And Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER FRANK WONG'S Alternative Writ Of Mandate Order And Order To Show Cause is continued to December 18, 2012 per agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Alternative Writ Of Mandate Order And Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Continued To Oct-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER FRANK WONG'S Alternative Writ Of Mandate Order And Order To Show Cause is continued per stipulation of the parties to October 18, 2012. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
